name: Chipotle Barbecue Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a heavy large saucepan over medium heat.
2. Add onion and garlic to the pan. Cook until tender (about 5 minutes).
3. Add all remaining ingredients to the pan.
4. Cover and simmer on medium heat, stirring occasionally, for about 25 minutes.
5. Season with salt as needed.
